title: How to Automate Content Creation With AI in 2026 (AI Content Repurposing)
summary: Trupeer AI is a platform that automates video editing and content repurposing from screen recordings. It generates multiple outputs including polished tutorial videos, SOP documents, and translated versions in languages like Spanish and French from a single source recording.
writeup: This video demonstrates Trupeer AI, a platform that automates video editing and content repurposing starting from a single screen recording. It shows how one source recording produces multiple outputs: polished tutorial videos, SOP documents, and translated versions in languages including Spanish and French. The walkthrough touches on capabilities such as voice cloning, AI avatars, and machine translation. The takeaway is a workflow that turns one capture into several reusable formats without manual editing for each.
